---
title: "Tracking Data"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Where to access tracking data 

Importance of sharing data

Different types of devices

Think about your question when choosing device type

[MOVEBANK](https://www.movebank.org/cms/movebank-main) is a large repository of animal tracking data

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
